description: Style NoteSport this black cap designed by adidas with climalite technology. Stay cool while the weather heats up, with the old school Adidas tri-stripes, beat the scorching sun and at the same time make a style statement with this sporty cap!Product DetailsBlack cap with embroidered eyelets on the crown, 'Adidas' text printed on the front and Adidas patented 3-Stripes appliquéd on the visor partly on crown, with an adjustable buckle back strap and Climalite embroidered on back strapMaterial and Care100% polyesterHand wash cold waterDo not dry cleanLine dry
